channel.title: Myths on PepsFeeder
channel.description: Recent content in Myths on PepsFeeder

item.title: 46 health myths most people believe in
item.author: support@pepsfeeder.com (Chris Mano)
item.description: We all heard at some stage in our lives some advice from our parents, family or friends that we looked after to appear that it is totally false, maybe even the opposite of truth, people to transfer a lot of talk mouth to mouth without checking after it, we tried in this article to compile a list of the most common myths people believe in.
